# Speaking at Azure User Group Iceland: Microsoft Sovereign Private Cloud with Azure Local

I’m excited to share that I’ll be speaking at the **Azure User Group Iceland** on **March 19**, and I’d love to see you [there](https://www.linkedin.com/events/7439323947361505280/)!

In this session, I’ll be diving into a topic that’s becoming increasingly important for many organizations around the world:

### **Microsoft Sovereign Private Cloud with Azure Local**

As **[EMEA Global Black Belt for Sovereign Cloud at Microsoft](https://www.thomasmaurer.ch/2025/10/my-new-role-as-emea-global-black-belt-gbb-for-sovereign-cloud-at-microsoft/)**, I work closely with customers who need to balance cloud innovation with strict requirements around **data sovereignty, compliance, and operational control**. In this session, I’ll introduce how the **[Microsoft Sovereign Private Cloud with Azure Local](https://www.thomasmaurer.ch/tag/azure-local/)** enables exactly that.

We’ll explore how organizations can:

- Run **sovereign workloads and productivity services locally**
- Use **Azure Local** together with **Microsoft 365 Local**
- Maintain **full control over data and operations**
- Meet regulatory and compliance needs in **hybrid** and even **fully disconnected environments**

The goal is to show how you can bring the power and consistency of the cloud to your own datacenter or edge locations—without compromising on sovereignty. Whether you’re operating in regulated industries, public sector environments, or locations with limited connectivity, this approach opens up new possibilities.

### Why you should attend

If you’re interested in:

- Sovereign and regulated cloud scenarios
- Hybrid and adaptive cloud architectures
- Running modern Azure services locally
- Understanding where Azure Local fits into Microsoft’s broader Sovereign Cloud strategy

…then this session is for you.

The Azure User Group Iceland community is doing an amazing job fostering deep technical discussions, and I’m really looking forward to the exchange and the questions from the audience.

📅 **Date:** March 19 🎤 **Session:** *Microsoft Sovereign Private Cloud with Azure Local* 📍 **Event:** [Azure User Group Iceland (online)](https://www.linkedin.com/events/7439323947361505280/)

More details about the event and the session can be found via the Azure User Group Iceland channels and here on L[inkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/events/7439323947361505280/).

Hope to see many of you there — let’s talk sovereign cloud, Azure Local, and the future of hybrid innovation!

### About the Author / [Thomas Maurer](https://www.thomasmaurer.ch/author/d9pe/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2080%2080'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Thomas is the EMEA Global Black Belt (GBB) for Sovereign Cloud at Microsoft, helping organizations across the region harness Microsoft’s sovereign, hybrid, multicloud, and edge solutions. He works directly with C-level leaders and technical teams to remove roadblocks, accelerate digital transformation, and shape long-term cloud strategies that meet business and regulatory needs. With over 15 years of experience in cloud and datacenter, including his previous role as Principal Program Manager and Chief Evangelist for Azure Hybrid, he combines deep technical expertise with a passion for customer success. He specializes in creating scalable architectures, solution accelerators, and thought leadership that drive adoption and innovation on Azure. Thomas is a passionate community advocate and frequently speaks at industry events such as Microsoft Ignite and Microsoft TechDays. He shares his expertise through his Cloud and Datacenter Blog at www.thomasmaurer.ch and on LinkedIn and X.com www.twitter.com/thomasmaurer.
